programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The Clampetts are visited by a real king, Alexander, so Granny and Mrs. Drysdale start matchmaking. The broke royal needs a wealthy bride and courts Ellie. Drysdale niece Doreen is tricked by a costumed Jethro and ends up unimpressed.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The Clampetts acquire a hippopotamus when an advertising scheme originated by banker Drysdale backfires.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The Clampetts head to England to visit the castle Jed inherited. Misunderstandings abound, from Jethro mistaking San Francisco for London, to the impounding of Granny's medical supplies, to the real intentions of the elderly chemist.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The Clampetts finally make it to their new castle and try to adjust to the English way of castle life, at the least the way Jethro thinks it is, based on his understanding of English myths and legends.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: When Jethro gets his draft notice, Jed decides he should pay what it costs the Army to train inductees. When Mr. Drysdale hears this, he starts figuring how he can get Jethro out on a Section 8.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jethro reports to the induction center after getting his draft notice. The Army isn't quite sure what to make of Jethro.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Since Granny can't plant crops in their yard, Jed thinks the solution is to buy her a plot a land somewhere else. He figures a place called Happy Acres is the best spot to buy land, not realizing it's a cemetery.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jethro thinks he wants to be a naval frogman, but Granny is concerned her tonic has transformed him. Mr. Drysdale, concerned about finances, has Miss Jane distract Jethro with comics, causing him to want to fly to the moon.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jethro heads down to the Reserves HQ while wearing an ancestor's Confederate Army uniform. The Sergeant thinks he's an actor there to participate in a Civil War reenactment. Jethro runs home to tell Granny the Civil War is still on.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Col. Blake asks the actor playing Gen. Grant to play along with Granny so that the Civil War movie can continue. Meanwhile, Jethro uses his 6th grade education to take the written test to enter the Reserves.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: After Ellie seems to be no longer interested in Dash Riprock Granny decides it's time to do a little matchmaking. She thinks the handsome actor would be perfect for Miss Jane.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny wants to leave sunny California because she misses winter, sending Mr. Drysdale into a panic. The banker enlists Miss Jane in an elaborate scheme to convince the Clampetts that a blizzard has occurred.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The last televised wrestling match was such a success that the promoter wants a rematch. Granny isn't interested until Rebecca's parents visit.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando las víctimas son encontradas muertas por envenenamiento con arsénico en Long Beach, California, amenazas de muerte escritas a mano y otras pistas hacen que la UAC busque a un sujeto fascinado con la mitología griega.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando la UAC es llamada a Texas para realizar consultas sobre los asesinatos de prostitutas, la evidencia apunta a asesinatos con connotaciones religiosas. Pero a medida que profundicen en la investigación, el equipo podría poner en riesgo sus vidas.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: La UAC continúa su investigación de asesinato en Texas y las pistas descubren una profunda red de corrupción que podría ser el motivo de los asesinatos.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval: Placer culpable
programme.desc: La muerte de un oficial de la Marina lleva a Gibbs y al equipo al mundo de las prostitutas de lujo, confiando en la madame Holly Snow para que les ayude a atrapar a un asesino.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval: Doble trabajo
programme.desc: Cuando el trabajo nocturno de un especialista en polígrafos del NCIS toma un giro peligroso, Gibbs, Fornell y el equipo tienen que descubrir la verdad.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval: Obsesión
programme.desc: DiNozzo se siente cada vez más cautivado por una mujer a la que no conoce mientras investiga el asesinato de su hermano.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval: Zona fronteriza
programme.desc: El equipo intenta localizar a un asesino en serie, mientras Abby se dirige al sur de la frontera para dar un discurso con McGee a cuestas.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Con amigos como estos
programme.desc: El intento de Erin de condenar a un escurridizo jefe de la mafia por un antiguo asesinato se complica cuando su ex informante, Vincent (Dan Hedaya), deja la protección de testigos para proporcionarle una coartada a su antiguo jefe.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Traición
programme.desc: Danny se une a la búsqueda de dos fugitivos, siendo uno de ellos alguien a quien ayudó a encarcelar injustamente. Gormley critica un plan de Trey Delgado, un sargento de la policía de Nueva York que, según el, está teniendo una aventura con su esposa.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Juicio apresurado
programme.desc: Cuando Jamie es captado por la cámara cometiendo lo que podría interpretarse como brutalidad policial en una manifestación contra las políticas, Frank se ve obligado a entregar el caso a Asuntos Internos.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): El Mustang Bullitt
programme.desc: Danny y Báez investigan el robo del famoso coche que se conducía en una película clásica, ahora propiedad de Owen Cairo (Anthony Edwards).

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: El equipo de la UAC está investigando varios asesinatos en Bakersfield, California, que han dejado a las víctimas sin identificar. Además, el equipo da la bienvenida a la nueva agente Kate Callahan al redil del UAC.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Una serie de secuestros, asesinatos en Seattle envían a la UAC en busca de un sospechoso que sufrió abusos en el pasado y ahora busca venganza.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando un avión de pasajeros se estrella en Colorado, llaman al equipo de UAC para elaborar un perfil sobre las extrañas circunstancias del accidente. Kate siente una fuerte vinculación con el caso, ya que le recuerda una tragedia familiar del pasado.

programme.title: COPS

programme.title: COPS

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A suspect fresh out of jail is found with narcotics. A motorcycle named 'Love Machine' is saved from a hot wire. A man bursts his tire in a bad place and officers come to the rescue.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Deputies halt a burglary in progress. A truck is pulled over for stolen plates and officers question how it can start with a house key. A RV is no home for a family on the brink of falling apart.

programme.title: COPS

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man can’t handle that his van is getting repossessed. An Uncle finds his nephew has been hiding all kinds of secrets. Past lovers find their old wounds have yet to heal.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Meth and alcohol cloud the tragic accusations between husband and wife. A man learns why you should report if you recover your stolen vehicle. A woman says heroin is the only thing that can heal her.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Deputies race against time to save a young boy who is trapped inside a house fire. An intoxicated patron demands a beer on credit and argues with a store clerk. An older woman struggles with heroin.

programme.title: COPS

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A stabbing victim has his throat slashed while waiting for his wife. A man is shocked to learn that his rental box truck was reported stolen. Spice is found in a nervous passenger's purse.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers spot two suspects on a city bus and a prolonged standoff occurs. A wanted man's friends lie to Deputies about his whereabouts. Deputies find meth in a one-armed man's truck.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A stolen car and its occupants roll into a canal and are fished out by Deputies. A shoplifting trio is caught with stolen goods. A trip to the mechanic ends in an arrest.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A car chase ends when a driver foot bails at a restaurant. A nervous female driver blows smoke at Deputies and refuses to exit her truck. A domestic violence suspect talks in circles when questioned.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A disgruntled man is tased, leaving his unhoused wife to fend for herself. A sovereign citizen is arrested for a stolen firearm. A man in possession of meth claims a bag belongs to his girlfriend.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man caught with a stolen moped attempts to run while handcuffed. Police find a man with his pants down behind a business. A suspect found asleep in his poorly parked car complains of sciatic pain.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A stolen truck drives against traffic during a pursuit. A DV suspect overdoses after fighting Deputies. An intoxicated father assaults his openly-gay son and hides behind a tree.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Spike strips are used to end a pursuit, but not before a woman falls out. A passenger flees from a stop and changes clothes. A woman from Oklahoma driving a windowless car admits to using meth.

programme.title: COPS

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A dispensary security guard is shot by an angry client who dropped his ID. A woman is injured when she crashes a stolen car into a tree. A man barricades himself inside an apartment with his mother.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man flees from cops and reaches a dead end. A 40mm impact round is used to gain compliance when he reaches for his pockets. A man claims his anger got the best of him during an armed robbery.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A driver foot bails from a still-rolling van and hides nearby. A teen on a dirt bike refuses to stop for Deputies. A man attempts to run from a traffic stop but gets hung up on a fence.

programme.title: COPS

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Suspects in a white van throw a bike at police during a wild pursuit. A man runs from Deputies on a mini-bike. A mermaid commits traffic infractions and is caught with pills.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man arguing with his father over money fights with three Deputies after an unsuccessful Taser deployment. A motorcycle runs from cops in Fontana. A suspect in Alameda County rams a patrol vehicle.

programme.title: COPS

programme.title: COPS

programme.title: COPS

programme.desc: When the CSI team arrives at a car crash, they find three casualties and a human brain that doesn't belong to any of the victims.

programme.desc: When the CSI team investigates three seemingly unrelated murders, they discover someone is getting revenge for cold case murders that were never solved.

programme.desc: When the CSI team discovers a deceased rancher was also a ballistics expert, they have to work with the FBI to solve the case.

programme.desc: The CSI team says goodbye to Catherine Willows as she makes a life-changing decision.

programme.desc: When a woman is found dead and her hair is done up '70s style complete with vintage clothes, the CSI team discovers clues that point to a killer with a hair fetish.

programme.desc: Grissom y su equipo descubren a un joven estrangulado hasta morir ahorcado ...cuyo cuerpo parece el de una mujer.

programme.desc: Un sospechoso del pasado de Sara regresa, haciendo que se cuestione su futuro como CSI.

programme.title: CSI

programme.desc: Grissom y su equipo se adentran en el mundo de las peleas ilegales de perros para averiguar quién es el responsable de la muerte de una acaudalada dama de la alta sociedad.

programme.desc: Grissom y su equipo investigan dos asesinatos que tienen lugar en el rodeo anual de monta de toros de Las Vegas.

programme.desc: Grissom y su equipo luchan contra la gripe cuando el fiscal Klein les pide que investiguen la muerte de varios testigos clave para un caso del gran jurado contra una peligrosa banda de Las Vegas.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: La inquietante muerte de una niña de 3 años tiene un gran impacto en Catherine mientras busca pistas sobre su asesinato.

programme.desc: Brass y Nick reciben ayuda de una fuente poco probable, un criminal encarcelado (Method Man), cuando investigan dos asesinatos que tienen lugar en el mismo edificio de apartamentos.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom y su equipo descubren varias víctimas que tienen sangre verde, lo que les lleva a la conclusión de que sus muertes están conectadas de algún modo.

programme.desc: Horatio Caine and the CSI team unravel a complicated workplace murder mystery when a hated receptionist is found murdered in beautiful Miami.

programme.desc: When Horatio Caine's son Kyle returns from the war, he seeks the help of his father and the CSI team to solve a disturbing murder.

programme.desc: When a suburban soccer mom is murdered, the CSIs uncover her family's dark past, while Delko continues his undercover mission.

programme.desc: Todd Burton está tratando de salir de la furia del huracán cuando mata a un hombre en medio de una tormenta que le impide ver y ahora lo acusan de homicidio vehicular involuntario.

programme.desc: Después de que ven a una mujer siendo atacada por un tiburón, el equipo de CSI descubre que fue asesinada antes de ser arrojada al agua.

programme.desc: Una joven es arrojada por la barandilla de un estacionamiento, la investigación sobre su muerte revela pruebas de que la asesinaron antes de la caída.

programme.desc: Cuando asesinan a un hombre, Juan Marco Varón, que puede haber torturado o no a refugiados cubanos, llaman al equipo de CSI para investigar.

programme.desc: Ted Henderson muere en su propia casa y su cuerpo está desaparecido, mientras que dejan a su esposa y su hijo con vida, pero golpeados y atados.

programme.desc: When a slab of concrete starts bleeding in midtown, the CSIs' investigation takes them into an underground world of hardcore fighting.

programme.desc: After being injured, Mac watches his neighbors while recuperating and witnesses mysterious activity that leads to murder.

programme.desc: The CSI New York team of investigators follows a trail left by Shane Casey and realizes he is targeting a vacationing Danny out of revenge.

programme.desc: The newest CSI New York team of investigators’ team members is welcomed by stumbling upon a woman murdered in the NYPD crime lab building.

programme.desc: When a young woman appears to be strangled while in a live online chat that Adam witnesses the CSIs must determine if it was real or a hoax.

programme.desc: The CSI New York team of investigators finds a body on a rooftop and must find the killer who is manipulating crime scenes.

programme.title: CSI: NY

programme.desc: Después de una experiencia cercana a la muerte, el detective Mac Taylor está bastante decidido a cerrar su último caso sin resolver.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado

programme.title: Caso Cerrado

programme.title: Caso Cerrado

programme.title: Caso Cerrado

programme.title: Caso Cerrado

programme.title: Caso Cerrado

programme.title: Caso Cerrado

programme.title: Caso Cerrado

programme.title: Caso Cerrado

programme.title: Vaselina

programme.title: Casi famosos

programme.title: La chica de rosa
programme.desc: Ella es una chica de la secundaria del lado equivocado de la ciudad. Él es el galán rico que la invita al baile de graduación. Pero con la misma velocidad que crece su romance, crece la amenaza de la dolorosa presión de los amigos.

programme.title: Una boda complicada
programme.desc: Meg y Tyler nunca se llevaron bien entre sí, pero pronto tendrán que trabajar juntos para salvar el casamiento de sus mejores amigos. Ellos se darán cuenta de que hacen un buen equipo y que quizá hay lugar en este casamiento para un poco de romance.

programme.title: Ni Idea (Clueless)
programme.desc: El mundo de Cher se desenmaraña cuando aparecen dos galanes: un compañero de clase sexy, y su simple pero lindo ex hermanastro. Ahora se da cuenta de que cuando se trata de amor, no tiene ni idea.

programme.title: Señales de amor
programme.desc: En el transcurso de una noche mágica, Jonathan (John Cusack) y Sara (Kate Beckinsale) se conocen de manera inesperada, luego cada uno se va por su lado, dejando que el destino guíe su futuro, si es que se supone que terminen juntos.

programme.title: Pasión y baile
programme.desc: Sara es una chica de pueblo que sueña con ser bailarina. Cuando su madre muere repentinamente, debe abandonar sus planes para reunirse con su padre en el lado sur de Chicago.

programme.title: La rebelión de los colgados
programme.desc: Un grupo de trabajadores rebeldes del campamento maderero de la selva mexicana se insurrecciona ante condiciones inhumanas de trabajo. Luchan por justicia y mejores condiciones, desafiando la opresión en búsqueda de dignidad y derechos laborales.

programme.title: Rosauro Castro
programme.desc: García Mata, funcionario del gobierno, viaja a un pequeño pueblo mexicano para investigar el asesinato de Cardozo, candidato a la alcaldía y enemigo del "Cacique" Rosauro Castro, quien gobierna con mano de hierro.

programme.title: Al caer la tarde
programme.desc: Un hombre de origen humilde enriquecido a traves del trabajo duro, corteja a la hija de un terrateniente arruinado. Él le propone casamiento y así recuperar su posición económica y social, pero ella lo rechaza.

programme.title: El bruto
programme.desc: El dueño de un edificio planea desalojar a sus inquilinos para venderlo. Ante la resistencia de los afectados, y con la ayuda de su amante, contrata a un matón para que se encargue de los desalojos de manera violenta.

programme.title: La rebelión de los colgados
programme.desc: Un grupo de trabajadores rebeldes del campamento maderero de la selva mexicana se insurrecciona ante condiciones inhumanas de trabajo. Luchan por justicia y mejores condiciones, desafiando la opresión en búsqueda de dignidad y derechos laborales.

programme.title: El gran Gatsby
programme.desc: Robert Redford interpreta a Jay Gatsby, quien una vez amó a la hermosa y malcriada Daisy Buchanan (Mia Farrow) y la perdió por un joven rico. Ahora Gatsby posee una misteriosa fortuna… y arriesgará todo para recuperar a Daisy.

programme.title: El mafioso, el policía y el diablo
programme.desc: Tras apenas sobrevivir al violento ataque de un escurridizo asesino en serie, el jefe criminal Jang Dong-Su se encuentra formando una extraña asociación con el detective local Jung Tae-Seok, para atrapar al sádico asesino sencillamente conocido como “K”.

programme.title: 13 ASESINOS
programme.desc: Un ingenuo joven adopta la identidad de un hombre muerto para unirse a un juego de mafiosos de ruleta rusa. Con Mickey Rourke, Jason Statham y Michael Shannon.

programme.title: Asesino a Sueldo
programme.desc: Slevin (Josh Hartnett) se marcha de Los Ángeles, por un error de identidad cae en medio de una guerra entre los dos jefes criminales más temidos de la ciudad: El rabino (Ben Kingsley) y el jefe (Morgan Freeman).

programme.title: El mafioso, el policía y el diablo
programme.desc: Tras apenas sobrevivir al violento ataque de un escurridizo asesino en serie, el jefe criminal Jang Dong-Su se encuentra formando una extraña asociación con el detective local Jung Tae-Seok, para atrapar al sádico asesino sencillamente conocido como “K”.

programme.title: El cuerpo del delito
programme.desc: Tras una noche de pasión desenfrenada, Rebecca Carlson (Madonna) será juzgada por asesinato. Ahora está en manos de su abogado (Willem Dafoe) demostrar su inocencia, aunque el camino hacia la verdad tiene tantas curvas como su seductora cliente.

programme.title: El abogado del mal
programme.desc: Jamie Foxx presenta la inspiradora historia real del director de una banda de música de instituto que transformó a su variopinta banda de jazz en un legendario grupo de funk que arrasó en todo el país.

programme.title: Barrio chino
programme.desc: Jakes Gittes, investigador privado, revela una red de escándalos personales y políticos cuando es contratado por una hermosa mujer de alta sociedad para investigar las relaciones extramatrimoniales de su esposo.

programme.title: El bufete
programme.desc: Mitch es un abogado atraído por una gran firma con la promesa de un futuro brillante. Las cosas no salen según lo planeado después de que se ve envuelto en un caso de asesinato.

programme.title: Leones por corderos
programme.desc: Tres historias interrelacionadas: un profesor intenta inspirar a uno de sus alumnos, dos de sus antiguos alumnos se encuentran atrapados en Afganistán, y un senador en Washington tiene una nueva estrategia de guerra.

programme.title: Valkiria
programme.desc: Una dramatización del asesinato y complot político del 20 de julio de 1944 por oficiales del ejército alemán renegados desesperados contra Adolf Hitler durante la Segunda Guerra Mundial.

programme.title: El bufete
programme.desc: Mitch es un abogado atraído por una gran firma con la promesa de un futuro brillante. Las cosas no salen según lo planeado después de que se ve envuelto en un caso de asesinato.

programme.title: Arcángel
programme.desc: El profesor Fluke Kelso se encuentra con un misterioso anciano vinculado a Joseph Stalin.

programme.title: Seis grados de separación
programme.desc: Haciéndose pasar por el hijo de un famoso actor, un joven desconocido (Will Smith) entra hábilmente en el mundo elitista de los marchantes de arte (Stockard Channing, Donald Sutherland) y pone en marcha algo que cambiará sus vidas para siempre.

programme.title: Pisando fuerte
programme.desc: Cuando se trata de imponer la ley, un solo hombre puede marcar la diferencia. Dwayne 'la Roca' Johnson no tiene piedad al hacer imperar la justicia y aplastar la corrupción en esta historia de un hombre que decide actuar para recuperar su ciudad.

programme.title: En el juego del asesino
programme.desc: Un detective corre contra-reloj para mantenerse un paso adelante del asesino serial, que dirige ataques mortales desde prisión. Henry Cavill y Ben Kingsley son los protagonistas de esta película llena de acción que no dejará de sorprenderte.

programme.title: Redención
programme.desc: Jason Statham interpreta a un cobrador que trabaja para un jefe de la mafia local en este thriller de acción de alto octanaje. Afectado por el asesinato de un amigo y consumido por deseos de venganza, se sumerge en un mundo de violencia.

programme.title: Pisando fuerte
programme.desc: Cuando se trata de imponer la ley, un solo hombre puede marcar la diferencia. Dwayne 'la Roca' Johnson no tiene piedad al hacer imperar la justicia y aplastar la corrupción en esta historia de un hombre que decide actuar para recuperar su ciudad.

programme.title: La guerra de los mundos
programme.desc: En esta nueva versión moderna del clásico horror de ciencia ficción de H.G. Wells, la civilización se arruina cuando una súper raza de extraterrestre invade la Tierra.

programme.title: La guerra de los mundos 2
programme.desc: Dos años después de la invasión marciana, los mayores miedos de George Herbert se confirman: ellos han regresado.

programme.title: La última pelea
programme.desc: La última pelea" narra la conmovedora e inspiracional historia de la familia Conlon, Brendan (Joel Edgerton), Tommy (Tom Hardy) y Paddy (Nick Nolte), quienes encuentran redención en la arena al luchar para arreglarse a sí mismos y a su familia.

programme.title: Cody Banks: destino Londres
programme.desc: En Inglaterra, Cody Banks se hace pasar por un prodigio de la música para frustrar los planes de un agente malvado que quiere dominar el mundo con un dispositivo controlador de mentes.

programme.title: Max
programme.desc: Un perro que ayudó a los soldados en Afganistán vuelve a los EUA, donde lo adopta la familia de su adiestrador tras sufrir una experiencia traumática.

programme.title: Rescate al alba
programme.desc: Durante la guerra de Vietnam, el piloto americano, Dieter Dengler (Christian Bale) es derribado y tomado prisionero por el Vietcong. Durante su cautiverio, le tocó vivir una de las experiencias más notables y horrorosas de toda la guerra.

programme.title: Juegos de guerra
programme.desc: Matthew Broderick, en una excitante y superentrenida película sobre un joven y experto informático que con su habilidad es capaz de poner en jaque al Departamento de Defensa de los Estados Unidos y porovocar la Guerra Mundial.

programme.title: Masters del universo
programme.desc: El malvado Skeletor (Frank Langella) quiere conquistar el universo. ¡Pero no teman! He-Man (Dolph Lundgren) le ha declarado la guerra, y la batalla entre el bien y el mal ha llegado a la Tierra. Courteney Cox coprotagoniza esta épica aventura.

programme.title: The SECRET OF NIMH
programme.desc: In this suspenseful and heartwarming animated adventure, a mild-mannered mouse needs an engineering miracle, courage and the Secret of NIMH to save her house from a farmer’s plow! Starring the voices of Dom DeLuise, John Carradine and Peter Strauss.

programme.title: Superagente Cody Banks
programme.desc: Frankie Muniz encarna a un agente juvenil de la CIA en esta mezcla de comedia y acción. Cody Banks es elegido para impedir el complot de un villano que busca apoderarse del mundo. ¡Pero primero, él debe superar su timidez hacia las chicas!

programme.title: Un película de miedo 3
programme.desc: David Zucker dirige Scary Movie 3, una película llena de actuaciones especiales divertidas e innecesarias, que se burla de las películas de terror, los éxitos de taquilla, y de la cultura popular.

programme.title: Una película de miedo
programme.desc: En esta divertida parodia de una película de terror, un grupo de adolescentes son acosados por un psicópata enmascarado. Protagonizada por Carmen Electra, Marlon Wayans, Jon Abrahams, Shannon Elizabeth, Shawn Wayans, y Anna Faris.

programme.title: Scary movie 2: Otra película de miedo
programme.desc: ¡Alguien llevó demasiado lejos a tu amor por las secuelas! Regresan los personajes cómicos favoritos de 'Scary Movie', con mayor diversión e irreverente de la película original.

programme.title: Un película de miedo 3
programme.desc: David Zucker dirige Scary Movie 3, una película llena de actuaciones especiales divertidas e innecesarias, que se burla de las películas de terror, los éxitos de taquilla, y de la cultura popular.

programme.title: Resaca mortal
programme.desc: Después de celebrar la boda de Doug en un hotel en Laughlin, Nevada, los chicos con resaca Bradley, Ed y Zach se despiertan en una distopía futurista, al haber perdido a su amigo, Doug.

programme.title: SUNDOWN
programme.desc: En esta comedia hilarante y llena de acción, los mejores amigos Logan y Blake viajan a la destinación exótica de Puerto Vallarta para las vacaciones de primavera. Allí van a encontrar un paraíso de tequila con grandes problemas.

programme.title: Un par de seductores
programme.desc: Dos estafadores rivales hacen una apuesta: ganará el primero que estafe cincuenta mil dólares a la próxima mujer que conozca, y el otro se irá de la ciudad. Hay mucho en juego en esta comedia divertida, ingeniosa, sucia y podrida.

programme.title: El Infierno (LAS)

programme.title: Como agua para chocolate
programme.desc: Después de que el hombre que ella admira se case con su hermana, una joven mexicana le dedica su pasión a la cocina, descubriendo que puede transmitir sus emociones a través de las comidas que prepara.

programme.title: El Crimen del Padre Amaro LAS
programme.desc: La política y las pasiones sexuales amenazan con corromper a un joven sacerdote recién ordenado en un pequeño pueblo mexicano.

programme.title: Bala mordida

programme.title: Una noche sin luna

programme.title: Neruda

programme.title: Sabor a sangre y chocolate
programme.desc: Adaptación del relato de la autora Annette Curtis Klause acerca de una joven loba adolescente, que debe elegir entre su amor por un joven humano muy lindo y honrar la lealtad de la manada.

programme.title: Especies
programme.desc: Un experimento genético genera a una hermosa mujer mutante que amenaza a la raza humana.

programme.title: Terror en Amityville

programme.title: Sabor a sangre y chocolate
programme.desc: Adaptación del relato de la autora Annette Curtis Klause acerca de una joven loba adolescente, que debe elegir entre su amor por un joven humano muy lindo y honrar la lealtad de la manada.

programme.title: Pulse

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: When a fire breaks out in a restaurant where they are dining, Maude and Vivian escape with only surface bruises, but Walter has to cope with a much deeper psychological scar.

programme.title: Maude

programme.desc: Archie comes home from the laundromat in fury. It seems that he overloaded one of the machines causing the machine to eat his clothes and cause a flood. The irate proprietor of the laundromat, soon stops by to get Archie to pay for the damages.

programme.desc: Gillespie and Tibbs investigate an allegation that a popular school teacher has molested a student; however, it seems that the people of Sparta have already passed judgement, and details from the teacher’s past only increase their suspicions.

programme.desc: La desaparición de la atleta universitaria de Filadelfia, Aimee Willard, es investigada después de que su carro fuera encontrado al costado de la carretera.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Durante siete años, un trío de hombres robó un banco tras otro. Siempre se escapaban antes de que llegara la policía y no dejaban pruebas.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Un disparo en la oscuridad
programme.desc: Una mujer es asesinada a tiros. ¿Pero fue un homicidio o un suicidio? Se necesitaría la experiencia de expertos forenses y dos juicios con jurado para determinar el destino del asesino acusado.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En este episodio, un asesinato de una década de una joven ama de casa de Texas es investigado.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: La policía de California tenía varios sospechosos en el robo y brutal asesinato de una pareja de ancianos.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: El mundo es un escenario
programme.desc: La policía es enviada a la escena de un tiroteo y descubren que el esposo de la víctima es uno de los suyos: un detective de homicidios que dice que su esposa se disparó accidentalmente en la cabeza.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Testigo presencial
programme.desc: Una adolescente desapareció después de una noche de paseos a caballo. Su cuerpo fue encontrado un mes después, a cinco kilómetros de su casa.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando se encuentra muerta a Wanda Mason, empleada de una tienda, los investigadores descubren que la cámara de seguridad de la tienda ha captado todo el asesinato.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1996, Gayle Isleib, de 54 años, fue emboscada en su camino de entrada de Manchester, Connecticut, y asesinada a tiros. Ahora la policía debe determinar si el amor se convirtió en obsesión... y en un motivo de asesinato.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Lisa Manderach y su hija Devon dejaron su casa para ir de compras, pero no regresaron a la hora que se esperaba. El esposo de Lisa, Jimmy, llamó a la policía lleno de pánico para denunciar su desaparición y los dirigió a un centro comercial cercano.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Asesino forestal
programme.desc: Un asesino intentó incinerar y destruir todo lo que pudiera relacionarlo con su crimen.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1984, el cuerpo de la universitaria Laura Salmon fue encontrado en una granja de Tennessee, cubierto con sus propios jeans y los jeans del asesino.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando se descubre el cuerpo descompuesto de una adolescente, la policía no tiene pistas sobre su identidad.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1991, Dorothy Donovan fue asesinada en su casa de Dover, Delaware. Cuando su hijo declaró que fue asesinada por un polizón que la había recogido, la policía se mostró escéptica.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: No había una razón clara para que un joven y saludable estudiante universitario estuviera muerto. Pero cuando el forense descubrió una pequeña pista durante la autopsia, los investigadores pudieron descubrir un misterio lleno de traición y venganza.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Dos sospechosos están vinculados a un asesinato por unas botas manchadas de sangre y una pistola, pero el dueño de los artículos dice que nunca conoció a la víctima.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando Lori Auker, de 19 años, salió de su casa de Pennsylvania para ir a trabajar y nunca llegó, se necesitó de la tecnología de la era espacial, pelos de gato e insectos para identificar al secuestrador de la mujer.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Llamado desde Casa
programme.desc: Una investigación de asesinato en Florida atraviesa jurisdicciones de New York y Jamaica.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Bruce Miller fue asesinado a tiros en la oficina del negocio de depósito de chatarra que poseía. La escena del crimen estaba casi inmaculada.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Crimen limpio
programme.desc: Una empleada de una tintorería fue violada y asesinada en la tienda. La policía recurrió a la ciencia forense en busca de las respuestas que necesitaban.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Una bailarina de gogó le dijo a su familia que necesitaba alejarse por un tiempo, y luego simplemente desapareció. Los investigadores sospecharon, porque ella no se llevó ni su auto ni su ropa.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Cuatro caminos
programme.desc: Una mujer nativa americana fue brutalmente asesinada en el desierto de Nuevo México y la escena del crimen estaba llena de evidencia forense.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Hundreds of beautiful and talented women converge on AT&T Stadium to start the hardest audition process in professional sports, trying out for a coveted spot on the most famous NFL cheerleading squad in the world, the Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: With the field narrowed down to 119 women, the pressure is on. They must quickly learn a power pom routine and the famous kickline in order to perform it an hour later before the judges.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The veterans finally enter the audition process. Now all 83 women are judged head to head during a panel interview, a solo dance performance and on their appearance on the football field as seen and the big screen.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: 44 women begin the very first training camp at the new 1 billion dollar Cowboys' facility, The Star. At the First Meeting, Kelli lays down the law and makes it clear that eight women will be sent home this summer.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: First, the ladies need to have the "classic look" of a Dallas Cowboys Cheerleader. Kelli's hair and make-up transformations are legendary. The ladies are also assessed through a new state of the art fitness test, "Styku".

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Kelli media trains the rookie candidates to determine who best represents the DCC at press events. NBC news anchor, Meredith Land tests their on-camera interview skills.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Personality is critical when representing the DCC brand. Kelli takes the women on location to see how they interact during a public appearance.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Katy Perry's choreographer, Nick Florez, stops by to offer some performance advice to the ladies. A day that each cheerleader never forgets. The first time they wear the DCC uniform to pose for their cameo photos.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The squad goes on an appearance to support pop music star, Demi Lovato. The ladies learn the entrance to the famed pre-game dance. It's a make or break moment. If a woman can't learn it quickly it might be her last night.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: With two suspended vets, the team must re-block their formations for their Hall Of Fame performance. New vets step up as a new point of the triangle is named. The rookie candidates try to get their footing during this never seen before rehearsal.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: 23 veterans travel to Canton, Ohio to perform at Jerry Jones' induction to the Pro Football Hall of Fame. All eyes are watching as the DCC perform for the NFL elite.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: As training camp winds down the pressure skyrockets. No one wants to be sent home now. The ladies start to crack under the pressure. Another one is sent home. Will this be the final cut?

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Kelli announces the official squad and the women realize the hard-fought dream of becoming a Dallas Cowboys Cheerleader. Full of excitement and nerves, the squad prepares for their very first football game at AT&T Stadium.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Hundreds of eager hopefuls -- ranging from starry-eyed rookies to experienced NFL cheerleaders -- gather at AT&T Stadium for a shot at joining the world's most famous squad.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: A double homicide in upstate New York leads detectives on a cross-country investigation to piece together a case with a surprising suspect at the center.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: After Tahereh Ghassemi disappears from the Louisiana home she shares with her adult son, detectives discover that she'd recently come into a great deal of money; the investigation reveals an astonishing plot with international implications.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: The battle between a wife and a mistress for one man's heart leads to a deadly car chase.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: Michelle Hadley is exonerated after spending three months in jail for attempted forcible rape of her ex-fiance's wife.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: When a young woman finds out that her boyfriend might have shot and killed a college football player out of revenge, she struggles with coming forward to officials, fearing she could lose her life.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: When a graduate student is shot dead outside of her North Carolina home, a 911 caller leads detectives to believe the victim's fiance is the key to solving the case.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: The family members of murdered California entrepreneur Chris Smith speak out; interviews with investigators, Smith's former colleague, and prosecutor Matt Murphy.

programme.title: Dateline NBC

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: When two Americans go missing in Panama, natives discover the dark side of a fun-loving bartender.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: When a determined investigator works with a prosecutor in hope of solving a 20-year-old murder case, a dark secret is uncovered.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: Years after a Montana man is found dead, his son opens up a box of case files to find out what really happened.

programme.title: Rock of Love: Bikini Day Care
programme.desc: The tour hits Panama City Beach, Florida. Seven girls show their mothering skills by taking care of a gaggle of rowdy youngsters at the pool.

programme.title: Rock of Love: Exes and Ohs!
programme.desc: Secrets come out when Bret invites his ex-girlfriend Ambre and Rock of Love alum Heather to interrogate the remaining six girl's exes.

programme.title: Rock of Love: Duet To Me One More Time
programme.desc: Four girls are challenged to write lyrics to one of Bret's songs and sing with him.

programme.title: Rock of Love: Double Dates
programme.desc: Bret plans a couple of fantasy dates for his last three girls, but when one girl gets to go twice, the other two are worried that Bret has already made his final decision.

programme.title: Rock of Love: Bret’s Rock of Love III
programme.desc: Bret takes his final two girls to the Dominican Republic to spend some quality, romantic time with each one before making his final choice.

programme.title: Rock of Love: Rock of Love Girls Where Are They Now?
programme.desc: What the hell happened to all those girls? From actress to artist, scholar to show girl, prom queen to porn star, they've all gone on to bigger and better things.

programme.title: Wife Swap UK
programme.desc: What happens when a working mum with strong family values clashes with parents who put themselves first?

programme.title: Wife Swap UK
programme.desc: There are tears and tantrums as both mums introduce their new rules. Nick reckons he's in danger of ending up in a padded cell and Alan leads Sam a merry dance.

programme.title: Wife Swap UK
programme.desc: In this powerful swap, find out what happens when a perfectionist swaps life with a woman who likes life in the slow lane.

programme.title: Wife Swap UK
programme.desc: What happens when Tracy imposes her management skills on Michele's family? Steven, for one, isn't enamoured

programme.title: Wife Swap UK
programme.desc: When Lisa and Agnes swap lives, homes and families, Agnes is shocked by the freedom of expression in its many guises in Portsmouth.

programme.title: Wife Swap UK
programme.desc: It's the last ever Wife Swap, as Bentley-driving lady-of-leisure Torre Carter from Kent, swaps with mum-of-seven Sam Dale, who lives in one of Britain's largest council estates in Hull.

programme.title: I Love New York: Do You Have Love For New York?
programme.desc: After getting her heart broken not once but twice, New York summons 20 single men to her mansion with the hope of finding true love. The guys think its one big party until New York's mom busts in through the front door.

programme.title: I Love New York: The Mangeant
programme.desc: Chamo, NY's Assistant, calls the 15 guys to the backyard for a meeting. New York addresses them from her balcony – they will be competing in a male beauty pageant, a mangeant, and the winners will get dates with her.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal
programme.desc: With 26 sealed briefcases full of varying amounts of cash, ranging from a penny to $1m – contestants decide whether to accept an offer of cash from ‘the Banker,’ in exchange for what might be contained in the contestant’s chosen briefcase.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal
programme.desc: The contestant picks one case which is theirs to keep. As each of the 25 cases is opened, the likelihood of the player having a valuable cash amount in their case decreases or increases, with ‘the Banker’ tempting the player throughout the game.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The pending birth a new baby for Spike and Snake inspires Emma to search for her birth father. With some detective work, Emma discovers that her father, Shane, lives just outside the city.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Manny’s on a mission this year—it’s bye bye cute and hello hot. That means midriff baring tops, low-riders and thongs.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Paige organizes a final hurrah at the beach and even convinces her older brother, Dylan, to act as chauffeur. Spinner’s a bit put-off by Dylan’s openly gay attitude, but his presence is an eye-opener for Marco.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Spinner just can’t deal with the fact that Marco’s gay so he tries to cut Marco out of life. But when the guys all go to see Dylan’s hockey game, Jimmy makes sure that Marco comes along.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Things haven’t been going very well for Sean lately. Emma’s busy dealing with Snake’s illness and a brand new baby brother and Tracker’s busy leading the exciting life a normal 20-something.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Things are pretty hot between Craig and Ashley, but he’s disappointed that she keeps pulling back from going all the way.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Life’s getting more and more stressful for Ellie—her dad just left on another Peacekeeping Mission, her mom’s drinking again and she’s interning for Caitlin Ryan’s tv show. As things get more and more hectic, Ellie has no one to help her cope.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Emma decides it’s time to move on in matters of the heart when she realizes she has feelings for new kid Chris.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Terri’s in heaven-- not only does she have a terrific boyfriend, the wonderful romantic Rick, she also has the lead in the school play!

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The holiday season is fast approaching and the Jeremiah house is abuzz - Angela has her upcoming Christmas skating pageant, Craig and Ashley are a serious item, and Joey and Sydney are getting serious.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The holiday season is fast approaching and the Jeremiah house is abuzz - Angela has her upcoming Christmas skating pageant, Craig and Ashley are a serious item, and Joey and Sydney are getting serious.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Things are back on track for Emma now that she’s officially over Sean. Chris has even asked her out! But when she hears rumours that Sean’s part of a gang stealing things from Degrassi (including Mr. Simpson’s laptop)

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: It’s a big gymnastics meet at Degrassi, and Manny’s going to lead the team to gold! But when she starts to feel sick, she fears that her queasy stomach might be more than the flu or even a bad nerves.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Manny’s tempted by the romantic family scenario Craig paints and begins to think she and Craig really could keep this baby. Even Ashley shares the news with the entire cafeteria.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Five kids from different worlds are stuck in a room -- on a Saturday! When Raditch introduces Saturday detention, Sean, Ellie, Hazel, Jimmy and Toby are the first inductees.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Just when Terri thought she’d gotten over her ex boyfriend, Rick, he makes a concerted effort to win back her affections. She and her friends are wary – after all, leopards can’t change their spots.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Craig’s determined that he and the guys will be the “Last Band Standing” at Degrassi’s battle of the bands and win a spot on the show. So he sets the guys a fierce practice schedule and starts to write a killer new song.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The year-end Junior Formal is fast approaching, and Marco is in charge, except when it comes to a date. Problem is, Marco’s too nervous to ask Dylan out at all, let alone ask him to the prom.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: A stressed-out Paige and Spinner decide they need a break and skip school for the day. Ashley, meanwhile, is in the doldrums, too “sick” to go to school. So when Ashley calls Paige to get her homework, Paige decides Ash needs to join them in a little fun.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Once again, as things finally start to come together for Sean, the other shoe drops - his brother and guardian, Tracker, has found a new job in Alberta. Sean thinks his life is over until he finds out that he can legally live on his own.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The year end semi-formal is only hours away and Marco has transformed the gym into an idealized Bombay. It promises to be an amazing event, except Marco’s theme is causing tension between him and Ellie. Ellie finds the whole idea racist

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: It’s the end of summer and Paige receives some unexpected news - her rape case has finally made it to trial and she’s the star witness. Finally…justice!

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Shocked by the outcome of the trial, Paige holes up in her room. But when Marco is able to coax her out to party at Dylan’s dorm with the gang, things go from bad to worse when she and Spinner have a blow-out fight.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Marco’s a shoo-in for Student Council President until Alex enters the race. While at first Alex seems an unlikely candidate, her strong opinions and anti-establishment platform take hold with the students and Marco realizes she might well win.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Feeling ignored on Student Council, Emma finds a way to get her voice heard when she takes up a new cause - ganging up with the cool kids to keep Terri’s abusive ex-boyfriend Rick, out of Degrassi.

programme.title: Degrassi Junior High
programme.desc: Joey makes an after-school study date with the new girl, Liz, who has a fast reputation. He prepares for the date by buying condoms, but discovers a different person than he expected.

programme.title: Degrassi Junior High
programme.desc: Spike and Shane's parents finally meet and all agree adoption is best for Spike's baby. Shane, however, has his own ideas. Meanwhile, Melanie breaks a date with Yick to go out with Snake, but her deception is discovered.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Rick decides to get back at his bullies, hitting them right where it hurts – their cars. But when Jimmy becomes a member of the “Whack Your Brain” team, the two form a truce.

programme.title: Walking with Beasts
programme.desc: The beginnings of mankind can be traced back 3.2 million years to Ethiopia and the advent of Australopithecus, a type of ape which, like humans, was bipedal. These early members of the human family faced many dangers, including the sabre-toothed cat.

programme.title: Walking with Beasts
programme.desc: Revealing the exotic, oversized creatures that inhabited South America one million years ago, such as the deadly smilodon, the largest of all sabre tooth cats.

programme.title: Walking with Beasts
programme.desc: Looking at the depths of the Ice Age, following a group of mammoths who have been forced to travel south with the advent of winter. On a dangerous journey across the Alps, many become trapped in bogs or fall victim to predators.

programme.title: Natural World
programme.desc: For thousands of years, downtown LA hid an indiscriminate killer. In one of the most surprising wildlife crime stories in the world, `Natural World' turns forensic detective to solve the mystery and unmask victims and killers.

programme.title: Horizon
programme.desc: According to new evidence, the Woolly Mammoth went on roaming until about the time the Pyramids were built.

programme.title: Iceman: Mummy From the Stone Age
programme.desc: The discovery of a 5,000-year-old male mummy in the Austrian Alps has enabled scientists to re-create a vanished world.

programme.title: Attenborough and the Giant Dinosaur
programme.desc: David Attenborough tells the story of the discovery and reconstruction in Argentina of the world's largest known dinosaur, a brand new species of titanosaur. Measuring 37m long, it now holds the record as the biggest animal ever to walk the earth.

programme.title: Horizon
programme.desc: The earth split in India 66 million years ago in a disaster that may have caused the end of the dinosaurs.

programme.title: The X-Creatures
programme.desc: Chris Packham is out to determine whether the Himalayan Yeti and the Sumatran Orang Pendek exist.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs: Shortbites
programme.desc: Featured species are the opthalmosaurus and the ornithocheirus.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs: Shortbites
programme.desc: Featured species are the leaellynasaura and the tyrannosaurus.

programme.title: Ancient Worlds
programme.desc: Starting in Uruk, the `mother of all cities', in southern Iraq, Richard travels to Syria, Egypt, Anatolia and Greece, tracing the birth and development of technology and culture.

programme.title: Ancient Worlds
programme.desc: Richard looks at the winners and losers of the great Bronze Age collapse, and the new powers that emerged in the harder-edged Age of Iron.

programme.title: Ancient Worlds
programme.desc: Richard Miles explores the power and the paradox of the `Greek Thing', a blossoming in art, philosophy and science that went hand-in-hand with political discord, social injustice and endless war.

programme.title: Ancient Worlds
programme.desc: In Richard Miles's epic story of civilisation, there have been plenty of examples of the great men of history, but none came close to the legend of Alexander of Macedon, known as `the Great'.

programme.title: Ancient Worlds
programme.desc: Archaeologist and historian Richard Miles examines the phenomenon of the Roman Republic, from its fratricidal mythical beginnings, with the legend of Romulus and Remus, to the all too real violence of its end.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A miniature schnauzer compulsively spins in circles; four French bulldogs do not listen to their owner; a mixed breed has a leash tied so tightly it has to be surgically removed.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Once a criminal himself, Dog knows how it feels to be hunted. In this episode, Dog and the team delve into the depths of Honolulu's Chinatown as they search for a young Samoan girl who's gone down the wrong path. After a frustrating day of hunting, D

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: While hunting an elusive deep sea fisherman, Dog is also trying to plan a great Mother's Day for Beth, but he's having problems finding the special flowers Beth wants.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog is hunting a man known as The Godfather of Waikiki. Dog and Beth bailed him out as a courtesy, but now he is refusing to go to court. If Dog doesn't bring him in, it could cost him more than money; he may lose his respect on the street.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog has a big problem. Patty Estabilio has jumped a $15,000 bail bond and disappeared into Hawaii's underworld. Kissing the kids good night, Dog and Beth, with Tim and Leland at their side, plunge into a drug-infused netherworld.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Justin is the low man on the totem pole in the Chapman clan, and this means that the rest of the team is always teasing him. But Justin wants to be a full-fledged member of the team, and Dog has a fugitive that will be his test case.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and his team return to their roots, with a visit to their home town of Denver. Dog and Tim begin the day with an early morning radio show appearance, and it pays off when a listener calls in with a tip about one of the fugitives they're hunting.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Back in Denver Dog discovers that recapturing the past can be more difficult then tracking down felons. On a day of more misses then hits in their fugitive hunting, Dog and Beth repeatedly collide with reminders of their early days.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog hunts down Chris, a fugitive wanted on drug charges. Dog turns over every rock, but to no avail. Later, they decides to revoke the bonds they holds on Chris's mother and stepfather because they've violated the conditions of their own bonds.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog goes after Virginia, a hard-to-find lawbreaker. He gets a tip that a pickup truck will be going to Virginia's house. In true private-eye fashion, the team tails the truck in two SUVs, regularly switching the follow car to throw off their scent.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog decides to sweep the island clean of as many fugitives as he can in two days. Raymond, wanted on drug charges, is an easy grab. Mauro, wanted for solicitation, is busted. And a Samoan, Siamau, is convinced to fly back to Hawaii from L.A.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog goes after a fugitive named Tracy who lives in a homeless shelter, but the shelter's staff is uncooperative, and the two sides get into an angry confrontation that forces Dog to temporarily back off.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog juggles his job and family responsibilities at the same time. He leads the search for Robert, a low-level drug dealer. As he hunts down Robert, Dog gets on the phone to tell Beth not to spend too much money to furnish Leland's Honolulu apartment.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Upset because one his puppies may die and wanting to give the little guy a second chance in life, Dog decides to offer one of the fugitives a second chance, too. He captures Paul, a meth addict, then steers him to a rehab program instead of jail.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and his team are out to revoke bail on Eugene, a chronic heroin addict. They find him in a squalid apartment with a huge stockpile of syringes, and they can see that his physical condition is deteriorating.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and his team fight the war on ice-crystal methamphetamine-on many fronts. They appear on a special anti-drug float in a parade. Then they go after bail-jumping Pana, a convicted drug dealer.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Hunting down a fugitive known as "Bozo," Dog gets help from an unexpected source, Bozo's father-in-law.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and the team get a big surprise after they track down Bosco, a fugitive who they believe is addicted to methamphetamines. They discover he's off drugs, settling into a normal life with a new girlfriend, and is very friendly.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Leland has a full plate of fugitives in Kona, and the whole family heads to the Big Island to help.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog visits his mother's grave for inspiration before heading out to find Frankie, a violent fugitive hiding in the jungle. The spirit of Ma Chapman seems to help when Dog finds an unusual ally; Frankie's mother.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog lectures high school students about the dangers of drugs before going after Joseph, a dangerous fugitive who won't be easy to capture.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog takes the day off to try his hand at coaching, and assigns Tim and Leland to track down a dangerous fugitive on their own. Can the boys prove they can handle it?

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: The boys get distracted by the bikini-clad lovelies on Waikiki when they hunt for Lucy, a homeless, alcoholic fugitive. Beth is amused by the boys, but this is serious business: Tim will have to pay the bond if Lucy isn't caught.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog faces a tough personal and professional situation when he must hunt down his friend, Ili, who has helped him on many busts. But now Ili's on the other side of the law, and now Dog must bring her in.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog is out to make two grabs on two islands in one day. Part of the team is goes to Kona to nab a woman who skipped her court date. Meanwhile, Dog and the others hunt Patrick, a fugitive who's fighting in an Extreme Boxing event on the Big Island.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog has only a few days to catch a woman nicknamed Cats or forfeit Beth's $10,000 bond. But it won't be easy - Cats is eight months pregnant, so Dog will have to lure her in rather than risk a violent grab.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog is in for a big surprise after he catches a fugitive named Jonaven in a sting operation.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and the team really have their hands full when they go after a tough guy named Nunu, who leads them on a chase through apartment complexes and a shopping mall before he's finally captured.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: As the Board of Directors gathers to vote on the Denver-Carrington/Colbyco merger, Alexis pointedly tells the group that a nay vote will be met with immediate dismissal. The approval of the motion sends Blake into a fury.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Blake confronts Alexis with evidence of fraudulent figures involved in the recent merger; Alexis learns Blake's lucrative oil extraction process does not extend to Colbyco. Newlyweds Jeff and Kirby have their first fight.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: A scandalous newspaper headline implicates Congressman McVane with a young girl in Washington; he realizes Alexis orchestrated his downfall. Kirby finds she is pregnant.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: When Blake learns Steven's attorney Chris has moved in with his son, he vows to fight for custody of little Danny. Morgan Hess, Alexis' private investigator, asks his employer for a large sum of money to pay off a gambling debt.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Krystle and Alexis, trapped in a burning cabin far off in the woods, find the door has been locked--from the outside. Mark, who has come to see Krystle in this remote setting, dramatically rescues the two women, who are rushed to the hospital.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Mark is charged with attempted murder and arson; Alexis tells Blake and the police his motive was revenge. The other suspects-McVane, Hess and Adam, are questioned and released.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Alexis receives a note from the late Joseph--he set the fire with the intention of killing her; Claudia is released from the sanitarium; Steven and Blake fight over little Danny.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Kirby physically attacks Alexis, demanding to know the reason Joseph wanted her dead; at the trial for custody of little Danny, Alexis testifies against Blake, who erupts in anger.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: As the custody trial continues, Fallon testifies on her brother's behalf while Sammy Jo defames her ex-husband. Fallon leaves for Montana to investigate Adam's past; Claudia hits on the scheme for Steven to retain custody of his son.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Steven and Claudia marry, and the judge dismisses the custody suit; Blake offers Krystle a public relations job; Adam tricks Alexis into signing blank documents; Fallon and Jeff uncover evidence suggesting Adam may have poisoned Jeff.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Adam frames Alexis for the poisoning incident, and Blake threatens to take the story public; Mark attacks Krystle; Denver-Carrington's publicist Tracy is disappointed that Krystle has been appointed department head.

programme.title: Dynasty

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Mark has been tricked into selling his soul in order to save a little girl's life. But the Devil has another agenda: acquiring Jonathan's soul.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Factory workers ignore ground-water contamination, even though it is making their children sick. As a result, Jonathan takes drastic measures to force them to face the facts.

programme.title: The Big Boss
programme.desc: Bruce Lee faces an underground criminal element after members of his family begin disappearing. Now he must break his vow of non-violence to take on the terrifying "Big Boss."

programme.title: Fist of Fury
programme.desc: A Bruce Lee Classic! Lee plays Chen Zhen, a student of Huo Yuanjia, who fights to defend the honor of the Chinese in the face of foreign aggression, and to bring to justice those responsible for his master's death.

programme.title: A Game of Death
programme.desc: Billy Lo, a champion fighter and movie star, fakes his death to escape and then expose the crime syndicate that wants to control him.

programme.title: Ip Man
programme.desc: Ip Man is the award-winning film adaptation about the life story of Ip Man, the grandmaster of the Wing Chun style of kung fu and sifu of legendary martial arts superstar, Bruce Lee.

programme.title: Ip Man 2
programme.desc: Newly arrived in Hong Kong, martial arts instructor Ip Man encounters stiff opposition when he begins teaching the Wing Chun fighting style. But instead of bowing to his rivals' demands, he perseveres and retaliates with amazing speed and power.

programme.title: Ip Man 3
programme.desc: In this explosive third installment of the blockbuster martial arts series, when a band of brutal gangsters led by crooked property developer (Mike Tyson) make a play to take over the city, Master Ip is forced to take a stand.

programme.title: Ip Man: Awakening
programme.desc: While visiting Hong Kong, a young Master Ip intervenes in a kidnapping attempt, unintentionally igniting a turf war with a ruthless human trafficking ring.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2003, St. Cloud teenager Jason MacLennan returned home after a night out with friends and discovered his father's body lying in a pool of blood.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A security guard disappeared from his post without a trace; his remains were found a year later in a remote campsite.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A suspect's former lover comes forward with a fantastic tale of murder, mutilation and cremation. But there's no way to test the story's validity — until a plant pathologist and a dendrochronologist conduct tests where the cremation supposedly occurred.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1995, when off-duty Maine State Trooper Vicky Gardner is attacked by Steven Fortin during a routine stop, it triggers a chain of events which jumpstart a stalled murder case in New Jersey.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A woman was brutally murdered in her home and the only witnesses to the crime were the family dogs. An expert in canine behavior was convinced the killer knew both the victim and the animals, and he was determined find out what the dogs had seen.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Police investigate a missing college girl and discover her double life: attending school by day and working as a call-girl by night. Her body is found and investigators find her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Lives changed in the 20 years following an unsolved murder, and so did forensic science. In time, a high-powered microscope and DNA profiling revealed a clue no one had seen before.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1996, when a fundamentalist group begins robbing banks near Spokane, authorities know immediately that they are dealing with experienced criminals.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Seattle police had no suspects in the violent murder of grunge singer Mia Zapata. More than a decade passed before evidence collected by a prescient medical examiner could be used by forensic scientists to identify the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a college student vanished without a trace, her fellow students were concerned about her safety and their own.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A neighbor watched as a man stabbed his wife, pushed her into the swimming pool and held her head under water. The husband, however, had no recollection of the crime. A jury would have to decide between evidence and the mysteries of the mind.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Several suspects and conflicting evidence complicated a brutal murder investigation. But the forensics were clear on one thing: the killer knew his victim, and that alone gave investigators a head start.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In this classic episode of Forensic Files, the longest-running true crime series in television history, a serial bomber targets a judge, two attorneys and even a courthouse.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The doctors at the hospital couldn't determine the cause of Bobby Curley's hallucinations and intense pain. They treated it as a neurological disorder but his condition deteriorated. He was being poisoned.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Shortly after daybreak, a fire is started in a dumpster in Vancouver. No one sees the arsonist or the fire, which burns for hours in the deserted parking lot. But there's more than garbage in this flaming container.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a decomposed body is found stuffed in a barrel, it's easy to presume murder. But the body had been placed in the barrel 30 years earlier. One of the few clues was an address book found along with the body.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A teenager went missing after an evening of horseback riding. Her body was found a month later, three miles from her home. But the killer unknowingly left trace evidence behind.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2006, Texas real estate agent Sarah Anne Walker was found brutally murdered in a model home. Weeks later, a witness came forward who may have seen the killer. Police used forensic hypnosis to help him recall every detail of the man's appearance.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The wife of a respected police officer was murdered in her own home. The crime went unsolved for more than a decade, until a newly formed cold case unit took a fresh look at the evidence.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2000, Judy Southern arrived home from work and was shot by a gunman waiting within. Her husband arrived shortly afterwards, called emergency services and drove her to the hospital.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: On the night of May 22, 1992, Betty Wilson returned home after a meeting and discovered her husband lying in a pool of blood. Jack Wilson had obviously been murdered — but how?

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: There was no clear reason for a young, healthy college student to be dead. But when the coroner discovered a tiny clue during the autopsy, investigators were able to uncover a mystery filled with betrayal and revenge.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The wife of an Air Force officer was found dead in her bed with a plastic laundry bag near her face. Further investigation proved that the scene had been staged. Her death wasn't an accident — it was cold-blooded murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The only clue recovered from a shooting is a twelve-guage shotgun. Scientists use unique methods to lift the serial number from the weapon to trace it to its owner

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Who was the sexual offender who murdered two adolescent boys in Nebraska? The key to stopping him would be the unique composition of the "junk rope" he used to tie his victims.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: It was the single most deadly automobile accident in American history. Almost a hundred vehicles were involved, twelve people died and more than fifty people were injured. And it happened along a stretch of highway long known for dense, thick fog.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: No one in a quiet residential community saw anything unusual the day one of their neighbors was brutally attacked and murdered. Fingerprints found at the crime scene and surveillance video helped investigators to apprehend the presumed killer.

programme.title: Mighty Morphin Power Rangers

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: Cuando una mujer en Delaware desapareció en 1996, sus amigos y su familia descubrieron su vida secreta. La secretaria del gobernador había tenido un amorío ilícito con un hombre casado y acaudalado.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: En junio del 1992, unos bandidos enmascarados llevaron a cabo un robo audaz durante el mediodía. Esto marcó el comienzo de una ola de crimen que sacudió Seattle.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: Cuando la policía en una pequeña comunidad del estado de Washington comenzó a investigar la desaparición de una mujer de 22 años, no tenían manera de saber que se transformaría en una persecución a nivel nacional de un sádico sexual.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: Un extraño secuestró a una niña de ocho años mientras jugaba en el vecindario de Tucson, Arizona. Solo dejó atrás una bicicleta y a una madre desesperada.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: En una fría tarde de 1989, la capitana de la Marina Shirley Russel desapareció de Quantico, Virginia. La capitana Russel era una oficial dedicada; sus amigos y colegas estaban seguros de que no se había ausentado sin permiso.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: En febrero de 1996, el millonario de Nueva Jersey Frank Black viajó a Florida para cerrar un trato de negocios importante antes de su retiro.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: En 1997, agentes del FBI empezaron a investigar al magnate de las estaciones de servicio de Nueva York, Gurmeet Dhinsa, por modificar las estaciones de combustible.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: A principios de los años ochenta, la decapitación de un joven afroamericano llevó al Departamento de Policía de Miami-Dade y al FBI a lo largo de un rastro de asesinatos.

programme.title: Los nuevos detectives
programme.desc: Es difícil condenar a un asesino sin encontrar el cuerpo. Pero la ciencia forense puede encontrar maneras de hacerlo. Los asesinos astutos pueden deshacerse de los restos de sus víctimas, pero a menudo no son rivales para investigadores creativos.

programme.title: Los nuevos detectives
programme.desc: Nuevas técnicas forenses utilizadas para resolver casos antiguos: los avances en ciencia y tecnología alientan a los detectives a revisar el pasado con la esperanza de responder preguntas que han quedado sin respuesta y resolver crímenes.

programme.title: Los nuevos detectives
programme.desc: A veces, la balanza de la justicia es equilibrada por unos pocos miligramos de evidencia: un par de fibras, un relleno dental o una mancha en un trozo de cinta. Los casos más grandes a menudo se resuelven con las pistas más pequeñas.

programme.title: Los nuevos detectives
programme.desc: Por un precio, todo es posible. Los asesinatos por encargo surgieron de la necesidad de establecer la coartada perfecta. Al contratar a alguien para hacer el trabajo sucio, una persona puede desviar la culpa.
